.github/workflows/ci.yaml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use Java 11 instead of Java 8 to match the project's target JDK.

.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Add GPG signing configuration to the Maven publish step to support signed releases.
Pass the GPG passphrase as an environment variable to the Maven publish command.
Add a new CI step to build the RPM package using a dedicated Maven module.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.after:
- name: Pack RPM
        run: cd rpm/ && mvn --batch-mode -Drevision=${{ github.event.release.tag_name }} -Dsha1= -Dchangelist= -f rpm.pom.xml package

.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Pass GPG credentials to the RPM build step to allow signing the RPM package.
Update the file path for attaching the RPM to the release to match the new build output location.
Add a step to log in to the GitHub Container Registry for Docker image publishing.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.after:
- name: Login to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v2.1.0

.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Add a step to normalize the repository name to lowercase for Docker image tagging.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.after:
- name: Lowercase repository name
        run: echo "REPO_LC=${GITHUB_REPOSITORY,,}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Add steps to build and push a Docker image to the GitHub Container Registry.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.after:
- name: 'Build Image'
        run: |
          docker buildx build --output type=docker --tag ghcr.io/${{ env.REPO_LC }}:${{ github.event.release.tag_name }} --tag ghcr.io/${{ env.REPO_LC }}:latest  .
          docker push ghcr.io/${{ env.REPO_LC }} --all-tags

pom.xml.general_idea: Simplify and expand the exclusion pattern for GitHub workflow files in the build configuration.
Update the build exclusion list to exclude the Dockerfile instead of the Jenkinsfile, reflecting infrastructure changes.
Add an environment variable configuration for AZURE_NAMESPACE in the test plugin configuration.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Refactor constructor to accept a Sourceable config source instead of instantiating configs directly.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.after: EventContextConsumer(Sourceable configSource, ...) { ... new RelpConfig(configSource); ... new SyslogConfig(configSource); }

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Add MetricRegistry, JmxReporter, Slf4jReporter, and Jetty Server fields for metrics infrastructure.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.after: private final MetricRegistry metricRegistry; private final JmxReporter jmxReporter; private final Slf4jReporter slf4jReporter; private final Server jettyServer;

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Add AtomicLong fields for tracking record count and total size for metrics calculations.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.after: private final AtomicLong records = new AtomicLong(); private final AtomicLong allSize = new AtomicLong();

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Initialize JmxReporter and Slf4jReporter in the constructor.
Initialize Jetty Server and start metrics reporting in the constructor.
Register a gauge for estimated data depth in the constructor.
Implement startMetrics method to start reporters and configure Prometheus exporter via Jetty.
Update accept method to increment record and size counters.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.after: public void accept(EventContext eventContext) { ... records.incrementAndGet(); allSize.addAndGet(messageLength); ... }

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Register latency and depth gauges per partition in the accept method.
Add fallback logic for missing event UUIDs.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.after: String eventUuid = eventContext.getEventData().getMessageId(); if (eventUuid == null) { eventUuid = "aer_01="+UUID.randomUUID(); } ... .addSDParam("uuid", eventUuid)

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Add Azure-specific structured data elements (partition and event details) to the syslog message.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.after: SDElement sdPartition = new SDElement("aer_01_partition@48577")...; SDElement sdEvent = new SDElement("aer_01_event@48577")...;

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.general_idea: Include severity and facility in the SyslogMessage construction.
Attach the new partition and event SDElements to the SyslogMessage.
Update close method to shut down reporters and Jetty server.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/EventC.after: public void close() throws Exception { output.close(); slf4jReporter.close(); jmxReporter.close(); jettyServer.stop(); }

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Refactor main method signature to throw generic Exception instead of specific IOException and InterruptedException.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.before: public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException, InterruptedException {
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.after: public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Add imports for new configuration and metrics classes.
Introduce configuration source abstraction to support multiple config types.
Update AzureConfig instantiation to accept the new configuration source.
Update EventContextConsumer instantiation to accept configuration source and prometheus port.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.after: try (final EventContextConsumer PARTITION_PROCESSOR = new EventContextConsumer(configSource, prometheusPort)) {

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Fix bug where eventHubName was incorrectly set to namespaceName.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.general_idea: Refactor Output class into an interface to decouple implementation details from the API.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.before: final class Output implements Consumer<byte[]>, AutoCloseable { ... }
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.after: public interface Output extends Consumer<byte[]>, AutoCloseable { }

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Output.general_idea: Remove imports related to the removed implementation logic.
Remove static import for metric naming helper no longer used in the interface.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/config.general_idea: Replace System.getProperty calls with configSource.source calls to use the new configuration abstraction.
Refactor configuration loading to use a custom Sourceable interface instead of System.getProperty.
Refactor configuration retrieval to use a dedicated Sourceable interface instead of System.getProperty
